reviews.review_description:
Looks like too hard. Unable to choose difficulty. How about to add easy mode with additional time (more seconds) and "no bomb" option?

About heigh change there are two metods works in all games: press and hold Meta button and click power button twice. First click will show black screen and second click will start video picture again with heigh change to new position.

reviews.review_title: Not bad but no heigh detection ?
reviews.review_description: My daughter who is 9 found this fun but we couldn’t figure out how to adjust the height of some of the reaction games. For example, the first light up tile game had tiles set quite high request my shorty daughter to jump and almost have her Quest 3 headset some flying off. I’d give this a 5 if there was some kind of height adjustment .

developer_response.body: The game automatically calibrates the height when you turn it on. You can also calibrate the height at any time by simply pressing Y. Additionally, you can also adjust the distance between the buttons in the options. With these settings, children can play without any problems and you can even play while sitting down.

reviews.review_description: An fully-fleshed out arm workout game with varied and interesting gameplay mechanics, all for the price of free.  Initially, I was somewhat uncomfortable with the distance between the buttons but I am very impressed that the developer considered this and allows you to change the distance between buttons in the settings menu from 70-140% depending on the your arm reach. Consider purchasing add-ons to support the dev by for creating quality accessible content.

I downloaded this free game and then bought the extra 110 level pack as I enjoyed it so much. It's really well executed and looks great in mixed reality. All the levels are very short as the game is all about focus and speed. It often takes a few attempts to complete a level because it's very challenging, which is a good thing! Initially I found the field of view frustrating, but with more practice and extra focus I've found the directional sound helps to know where to look next. 

You probably know if this is the sort of game that would appeal to you, but I definitely recommend downloading it and giving it a try

I don't normally buy anything at full price but as I had so much fun with the free version, I bought the extra levels in this. Excellent game to sharpen your reflexes and concentration. Would recommend to all to try (many will buy).

Fantastic game !  Fantastic Support!!! 100% Fun fitness  , I recommend to everyone!And beautiful!!! they also like Hungarian subtitles for the game Operation Warcade please and then I already buy it and many of my friends

Update:
The Y button does work, but I have to reset every time I start the game. Maybe in settings you could add a height option. So I’m giving it 4 stars. Definitely a good game for us seniors 😀



I am pretty short and  69 years old. I cannot reach the top circles. Even trying to jump I can just touch the bottom sometimes. If that could be fixed I would love this game. If not , it’s a game I can’t use. 
Would be 4-5 star if there is a way to fix it
